description: Implement games 7-10 for the Coco y Mango mini-games platform

stories.title: Game 7: La alcantarilla (Maze)
acceptance_criteria: Maze navigation with fog-of-war (limited visibility around Coco)
Flashlight toggle with limited battery (15 seconds max)
5 coins to collect scattered in maze
Battery pickup items restore flashlight time
60-90 second time limit to find all coins and exit

stories.title: Game 8: El papalote (Balance)
acceptance_criteria: Kite balance mechanic - kite drifts left/right based on wind
Player drags or taps sides to counter wind drift
Wind direction changes every 3-8 seconds randomly
Balance meter shows kite position (center = safe, edges = danger)
3 lives - lose life when kite hits edge
Bird helpers occasionally nudge kite back to center

stories.title: Game 9: El tesoro perdido (Puzzle)
acceptance_criteria: Map grid with 8 landmark emojis (tree, rock, fountain, bridge, house, flower, bench, statue)
Spanish clues tell player which landmarks to tap in order
5 rounds of treasure hunts with increasing difficulty (3-5 steps per round)
Visual path line shows progress through landmarks
Wrong tap = lose attempt (2 mistakes allowed per round)
Treasure chest appears at final destination

stories.title: Game 10: La carrera de barquitos (Racing)
acceptance_criteria: Paper boat racing - tap repeatedly to blow boat forward
Swipe up/down to steer and avoid obstacles
Obstacles: sticks (slow), leaves (minor slow), rocks (full stop)
Distance meter shows progress to 100m finish line
Mango rescue event: he falls in water, tap rescue button within 3 seconds
